phrases.cultural_note: The cash-only policy is unverified; it's best to confirm with the staff.

likely_response.translation_en: Cards don't work today, cash only.

responses.english: Cards don't work today, cash only.

phrases.text_local: Bu akşam testi kebabı var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Availability can be unverified; it's safest to ask the staff.

phrases.intent_en: Do I wait for grounds to settle?
phrases.text_local: Telve dibe çökene kadar beklemeli miyim?
phrases.cultural_note: It is customary to let the grounds settle before sipping Turkish coffee.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, wait until the grounds settle.

responses.english: Yes, wait until the grounds settle.

phrases.intent_en: How long to grind Dibek coffee?
phrases.text_local: Dibek kahvesi ne kadar sürede öğütülür?
phrases.cultural_note: The grinding time can vary; it's best to ask the staff directly.

likely_response.local: Dibekçi hemen öğütür, birkaç dakika bekleyin.
likely_response.translation_en: The dibekçi grinds it right away, just wait a few minutes.

responses.english: The dibekçi grinds it right away, just wait a few minutes.
responses.french: Dibekçi hemen öğütür, birkaç dakika bekleyin.

phrases.intent_en: Do I wait for grounds to settle?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish coffee grounds need time to settle at the bottom of the cup before drinking.

likely_response.local: Evet, bir dakika bekleyin sonra yudumlayın.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, wait a minute then sip.

responses.english: Yes, wait a minute then sip.
responses.french: Evet, bir dakika bekleyin sonra yudumlayın.
